ai_tips: Starting out at 22m — 4.49km ahead with 9m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔22米出发——全程4.49公里，累计爬升9米。
0.40km in — pace 4:51/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.40公里——配速4:51/公里，强度正在建立。
Mid-run at 2.49km — the route is largely flat to downhill (total climb just 0m), so rhythm matters more than strength. 进行到2.49公里过半程——路线以平路和下坡为主（总爬升仅0米），节奏比力量更关键。
High point of the route: 22m at 0.00km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点22米，位于0.00公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -16.9% at 0.08km — you kept it controlled at 6:36/km, protecting the legs. 全天最陡的下坡：0.08公里处坡度-16.9%——你稳健控制在6:36/公里，保护了腿部。
4.10km — late-run check: pace 13:14/km, effort showing as the pace slips. 4.10公里——后程检查：配速13:14/公里，疲劳显现，配速下滑。
Finished 4.49km in 26:42 (avg 5:57/km, +9m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成4.49公里，用时26:42（平均配速5:57/公里，爬升9米）。全程稳定扎实。
